login.title: Sign in
login.privacyNote: Encrypted locally. Nothing leaves your device without you.
login.connectedAs: Signed in as {{name}}. Enter your Anthropic API key to continue.

errors.invalidPrefix: The key must start with sk-ant-

apiKey.notice: Your key is never sent to our servers. It's only used to talk to the Anthropic API.

google.failed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
google.notice: Connect your Google account to access Gmail, Drive and Calendar.

email.label: Email
email.notice: Your account stays on this device. No server.

slides.title: Hi, I'm Arty
slides.desc: Your personal AI assistant. Ask me anything — I'm here to help.

slides.title: Talk to me any way you like
slides.desc: By text, photo, voice or by scanning a document. I adapt to you.

slides.title: Connect your tools
slides.desc: Gmail, Drive, Calendar — connect your Google account and I'll be able to read your emails, access your files and manage your calendar.

slides.title: Customize the answers
slides.desc: Change the tone (concise, detailed, formal…) and the AI model (Claude, Mistral, Gemini) anytime from the top of the screen. Tap ? to learn more.

tooltips.dropdowns: Change the tone and AI model here
tooltips.attach: Send a photo or a file
tooltips.google: Connect Google to access your emails and files

profileSetup.subtitle: Just enough to personalise our chats. Stays on this device.

home.title: How can I help you?
home.hintHelp: Type <0>/help</0> to see everything I can do

spark.label: Spark
spark.description: Your proactive brief: mail, agenda and next actions.
spark.prompt: Give me a full briefing now: summarise my important unread emails and flag the ones awaiting a reply, list my agenda for today and tomorrow, then suggest up to 3 concrete actions to take. Do not perform any action (send, delete, create) without asking me for confirmation first.

suggestions.title: Suggestions
suggestions.calendarToday: What do I have scheduled today?
suggestions.calendarWeek: Show my calendar for the week

upgradeModal.title: {{model}} is Pro-only
upgradeModal.body: On the free plan you get access to <0>Claude Haiku (10/day)</0> and <1>Mistral (5/day)</1>. To unlock Sonnet, Opus, Gemini Pro and GPT, upgrade to Pro.

privacyWarning.title: Data leaving Europe
privacyWarning.body: This conversation contains messages processed by Mistral (servers in Europe). Switching to {{targetModel}} will send the whole history to the United States. Continue?

input.euOnlyUrlHint: Mistral can't open links (EU mode). To analyze the content, paste the article or video text directly here.

aria.holdToRecord: Tap to dictate, hold for Whisper
aria.autoSendOn: Auto-send on — release the mic to send immediately
aria.autoSendOff: Auto-send off — transcription fills the text area

voice.micDenied: Microphone denied — allow it in browser settings
voice.micDeniedNative: Microphone denied — allow it in Settings → Apps → Arty → Permissions
voice.unsupported: Audio recording not supported in this browser

brief.label: Daily brief
brief.prompt: Give me a brief of my day — what I should know, the important things not to forget.

errors.apiKeyMissing: API key missing — configure your key in settings
errors.apiKeyInvalid: Invalid or expired API key. Check your configuration.
errors.apiRateLimit: Too many requests. Wait a few seconds...
errors.apiOverloaded: The AI server is temporarily overloaded. Auto-retry...
errors.apiServer: Anthropic server error. Try again in a moment.
errors.apiConnection: Connection error ({{status}}). Check your internet connection.
errors.geminiError: Gemini error ({{status}}). Check your key or connection.
errors.mistralKeyInvalid: Invalid or expired Mistral API key.
errors.mistralRateLimit: Mistral request limit reached — retry in a few seconds.
errors.promptEnhancementFailed: Couldn't enhance the prompt — try again.

sidebar.euTooltip: Europe mode — data kept in France

morningBrief.connectGoogle: Connect Google to see your calendar and emails in the brief.
morningBrief.notificationBody: Your morning brief is ready — calendar, emails, and more.

today.label: What's on today?
today.prompt: What appointments do I have today?

priorities.label: Organise my priorities
priorities.prompt: Help me organise my priorities for today

idea.label: Give me a useful idea
idea.prompt: Give me a useful idea or tip for my day

location.title: Location
location.blockedLine1: ⚠️ Your browser has blocked geolocation for this site. The toggle is ON in Arty but Chrome won't prompt you.
location.blockedLine2: To re-enable: tap the lock icon (left of Chrome's address bar) → Site settings → Location → Allow. Then reload the page.
location.viewLastPosition: View last position sent to Arty

factChecker.description: Verifies the factual claims in each response
factChecker.costAuto: Fast Haiku by default, strict Sonnet on sensitive topics (prices, quotes, medical, legal). ~$0.0005-0.0015/message.

memory.title: Arty's memory
memory.description: View and edit what Arty knows about you

costs.title: My costs
costs.description: Monthly dashboard, by model, budget alert, CSV export

license.title: Pro license
license.prompt: Activate an Arty Pro key to unlock unlimited access.
license.success: License activated! You now have access to Arty Pro.

debug.title: Last position sent to Arty
debug.noPosition: Position unavailable (GPS unavailable or trigger not matched)
debug.geocodingFailed: Reverse geocoding: unresolved (Google Maps unavailable or coords at sea) — Arty receives coords only
debug.viewBlock: View the full block injected into the prompt
debug.noQuery: No location query made since the app started.

costsScreen.heroSubtitle: Local tracking of AI usage, based on real tokens.
costsScreen.sourceNote: Source: real tokens captured server-side (table `quota_model`), local history fallback when offline. Exact accuracy vs. official invoice.
costsScreen.alertDescription: Banner on next launch when the current month exceeds the threshold.
costsScreen.exportColumns: Columns: date, model, tokens_input, tokens_output, cost_eur
costsScreen.empty: Start chatting to see your costs here 💬

upgrade.heroSubtitle: No commitment. You can change later.
upgrade.legal: Secure payment via Lemon Squeezy. VAT included.
upgrade.statusPendingBody: Confirmation can take a minute. Check back in a moment.
upgrade.errorNoToken: Sign in with Google to check your subscription.
upgrade.errorNoEmail: No email found. Sign in with Google first.
upgrade.byokDescription: Your own API key · All models · Local storage
upgrade.proDescription: Everything in Free · Business templates · Priority support · No subscription
upgrade.subscriptionDescription: No API key · 500 messages/month · Claude, GPT-5-mini, Gemini, Mistral
upgrade.premiumPackDescription: For Subscription users who have reached their monthly quota.
